# A11y Compliance Reference

> Regulatory background for accessibility compliance. For implementation rules and code examples, see `.cursor/skills/a11y-compliance/SKILL.md`.

## Files

- [regulations.md](regulations.md): Regulatory framework summary (Section 508, EAA, WCAG, ADA)

## Quick Reference

- Standard: WCAG 2.2 Level AA (strictest common baseline)
- Key regulations: US Section 508, EU EAA (EN 301 549), US ADA Title II
- Testing: axe-core (automated) + screen reader (manual)
- Skill: `.cursor/skills/a11y-compliance/SKILL.md`
